name: ell (Language Model Programming Library)

auth.notes: LLM provider API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.)

agent_readiness.notes: Prompt engineering framework treating prompts as functions. @ell.simple decorator turns Python function into LLM call. @ell.complex for multi-turn conversations. Version control for prompts (ell.store.SQLiteStore). ell studio web UI for prompt exploration and versioning. Automatic prompt caching. Multimodal support. Integration with Instructor for structured outputs. 'Prompts are programs not strings' philosophy. By former OpenAI researcher. Growing rapidly.

gotchas: ell studio requires separate server process
best_when: Python teams wanting prompt-as-function programming model
Projects needing prompt version control and experimentation
Researchers and developers iterating on prompts rapidly
Integration with Instructor for structured LLM outputs
avoid_when: Teams needing large ecosystem (LangChain has more integrations)
summary: ell treats prompts as versioned Python functions. @ell.simple decorator makes any function an LLM call. ell studio web UI for prompt exploration and versioning. Automatic prompt caching. Multimodal support. By former OpenAI researcher. 'Prompts are programs' philosophy. Pre-v1 but growing. Best for Python teams wanting functional prompt programming with version control.
